category_sources: Official docs at https://nixpacks.com/docs describe build phases and generated Dockerfile/image behavior.
source_facts.description says Nixpacks turns app source plus Nix packages plus Docker into an image.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site https://nixpacks.com/docs uses the name Nixpacks.
Official repository https://github.com/railwayapp/nixpacks uses the name nixpacks.
docs_sources: Official Nixpacks documentation has a configuration file reference under /docs/configuration/file.
source_facts.homepage is the official getting-started documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/railwayapp/nixpacks, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs reference build image, phases, Nix packages, and generated Dockerfile behavior.
source_facts.description identifies the source-to-image workflow using Nix packages and Docker.
